title: Rui Ka Bojh
overview: The story revolves around a self-respecting, wise old Indian man, who decides to divide his wealth and property among his sons and then let them take care of them. But all doesn't go according to his plans as his sons don't want to take his responsibility and things start going downhill for the family from there. It's a journey of old-age, family values, love and respect for your family and responsibility.

trailers.title: Rui Ka Bhoj - A Film By Subhash Agarwal
